page_content:
Prerequisite: MUSC260.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the ARHU-School of Music department.

Credit Only Granted for. MUSC310 or MUSC360.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 357

MUSC361 Music in Western Culture After 1900 (3 Credits)

Continuation of MUSC360. A historical study of Western classical music, popular music, and jazz since 1900.
